scripts.convex:reset: docker compose -f convex.yml down -v && docker compose -f convex.yml up -d --quiet-pull
scripts.convex:up: docker compose -f convex.yml up -d --quiet-pull && echo 'Convex ready on http://localhost:4001'
scripts.gha:run-ci-full: bash -lc 'b=$(git branch --show-current); gh workflow run CI --ref "$b" -f force_full=true && gh run list --workflow CI --branch "$b" --limit 3'
scripts.publish:all: npm publish --silent --access public --cwd tool/cli && npm publish --silent --access public --cwd lib/convex && npm publish --silent --access public --cwd lib/spacetimedb
scripts.spacetime:generate: bash -lc 'PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" spacetime generate --lang typescript --out-dir lib/spacetimedb/src/generated --module-path backend/spacetimedb'
scripts.spacetime:health: bash -lc "curl -fsS http://localhost:4000/v1/ping >/dev/null && echo ' SpacetimeDB is healthy'"
scripts.spacetime:reset: docker compose -f spacetimedb.yml down -v && docker compose -f spacetimedb.yml up -d --quiet-pull
scripts.spacetime:up: docker compose -f spacetimedb.yml up -d --quiet-pull && PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" spacetime server add local --url http://localhost:4000 --no-fingerprint --default 2>/dev/null; echo 'SpacetimeDB ready on http://localhost:4000'
scripts.test: bun --cwd lib/convex test && bun --cwd lib/spacetimedb test
scripts.verify: bun run tsc && bun run check && bun run build:ts
